mapper.select: SELECT sum(cnt) over() as tot_cnt, A.* FROM ( SELECT user_name , count(user_name) as cnt , SUM(score) AS score FROM TBOT_BOSS_HIT_LOG WHERE room_name = #{roomName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND seq = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND score > 0 GROUP BY user_name ORDER BY count(user_name) DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
